role: Grand Ayatollah; Shia marja' (source of emulation)
bio: Grand Ayatollah Naser Makarem Shirazi is one of the most prominent Shia scholars and marjas (sources of emulation) in Iran. He was elected to the [Assembly of Experts for the Constitution](/orgs/assembly-of-experts-for-constitution) in 1979, representing Fars Province with over 84% of the vote. Based in Qom, he is the author of the influential Tafsir Nemooneh (Exemplary Commentary), a multi-volume Quranic exegesis. He has served as a member of the [Society of Seminary Teachers of Qom](/orgs/society-of-seminary-teachers-of-qom) and is known for issuing fatwas on social and economic matters. While broadly supportive of the Islamic Republic's system, he has occasionally criticized economic policies and corruption.
editorial_notes: Born 1927 in Shiraz. One of the most widely followed marjas in Iran. His Tafsir Nemooneh is one of the most popular Quran commentaries in Farsi.
